meta.title: Ranking America's fighters from slowest to fastest
meta.description:
Top speed may not be much use in a fight, but it's still fun to discuss. Here are the publicly disclosed top speeds of America's 5 front-line fighters. 
#shorts #f15 #f16 #f22 #f35 #f18 #fa18 #fighterjets
